title: The Legends of Rocks, Roger, and Oden Surface
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The night before the final battle-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's true after all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's really here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop lollygagging and do as I told you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: As you wish...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This should be a piece of cake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's been destroyed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Excellent...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Muhaha haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Next up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The great bridge linking Kibi and upon

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this really okay!? Isn't this bridge important!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: silence!! Just move onto the next one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We can repair it later!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: The great bridge linking Ringo and Hakumai

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look!! The bridge connecting the two regions is.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did this have to happen now!?...Now we cannot cross!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Next up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: These ships will never sail again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Good, just as planned!! Muhahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have yet to see the Samurai myself, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could they really have leapt 20 years forward through time...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From within a burning castle no less!?...It is true that their heads were never found, so I could never be certain of their deaths...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, even if I had seen them... it would still be hard to believe!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: The bridge linking Kuri and upon

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to make matters worse, that fool Yasuie caused some discard for my retainers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They were already doubting me, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It was all a prank!! Wahaha Ha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He made me a laughing stock...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it turned out that... these reports were accurate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It matters not whether others take my words seriously...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So long as I am the one with the power!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Muhahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I block every route leading to port toage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WONDER WHAT THEY'LL DO!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 4,000 people!? It is quite impressive that they were able to gather so many...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Kuri, I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However... not a SINGLE person will show up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ghosts of the Red Scabbards shall know true despair...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once they realise that they have been abandoned!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They will not even be given the opportunity to take revenge!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BACK IN THE PRESENT...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
